\section*{NAME}
get\_version - get the version of the library

\section*{LIBRARY}
codata (-libcodata, -lcodata)

\section*{SYNOPSIS}
{\ttfamily
get\_version()

}
\section*{DESCRIPTION}
Get the library version.

Deprecated. It will be removed in the next major release 3.0 when
the new codata constants will be released (2026).
Use codata\_version(3) instead.

\section*{RETURN VALUE}
\begin{description}
\item[character(len=:), pointer :: fptr] Pointer to a string.
\end{description}

\section*{EXAMPLE}
Minimal example:

\begin{verbatim}
      use codata
      implicit none

\end{verbatim}
\section*{SEE ALSO}
codata\_version(3)
